name: Mexican Skillet Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, butter, cinnamon, salt, and evaporated milk in an electric skillet set to 280 degrees.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil and continue boiling for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Turn off the skillet.
4. Add marshmallows, chocolate chips, chopped walnuts or pecans, and vanilla.
5. Stir until the marshmallows and chocolate are smoothly blended.
6. Pour the mixture into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
7. Cool before cutting into squares.
